query: SELECT id, name, email, consultorId, programId, isActive, canLogin, cadastradoPorAdmin FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%dina%' OR name LIKE '%Dina%' OR name LIKE '%makiyama%' OR name LIKE '%Makiyama%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT id, name, email, consultorId, programId, isActive, canLogin, cadastradoPorAdmin FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%dina%' OR name LIKE '%Dina%' OR name LIKE '%makiyama%' OR name LIKE '%Makiyama%'
